description: HuggingFace NDJSON v2 template fix. Fixed 3 bugs: (1) Content-Type text/event-stream → application/jsonl, (2) {{ESCAPE2:MESSAGE}} → {{MESSAGE}}, (3) \r\n headers. Also added [DONE] terminal marker. Template reloaded via reload_services.

test_messages.expected_behavior: warning text should appear in chat area

check_items: Is the block response delivered (etap log blocked=1)?
Does the chat area display the warning text?
Does the page show any error or blank state?
Check DevTools Network → conversation POST → Response tab for body content
Check DevTools Console for any errors
